transcript: Speaker A (Mother): बेटा कब से बुला रही हूँ मैं। खाना ठंडा हो जाएगा। [Son, I have been calling you for so long. The food will get cold.] Speaker B (Son): हाँ मम्मी, अभी आया। [Yes Mom, I am coming.] Speaker B (Son): हाँ सिया। [Yes Sia.] Speaker C (Friend): हे आर्यन, कैसा है यार? [Hey Aryan, how are you?] Speaker B (Son): ठीक, तू कैसा है? [Fine, how are you?] Speaker C (Friend): बढ़िया। [Great.] Speaker B (Son): बैठ, मैं आ रहा हूँ। [Sit, I am coming.] Speaker B (Son): हाँ सिया। [Yes Sia.] Speaker C (Friend): अरे आंटी, नमस्ते। [Hey Aunty, Namaste.] Speaker A (Mother): नमस्ते बेटा। [Namaste son.] Speaker C (Friend): कैसे हैं आंटी? [How are you, Aunty?] Speaker A (Mother): बिल्कुल बढ़िया, तुम कैसे हो? [Absolutely fine, how are you?] Speaker C (Friend): ठीक हूँ मैं भी। [I am fine too.] Speaker A (Mother): अच्छा ये बताओ, ये सिया कौन है? [Okay tell me, who is this Sia?] Speaker C (Friend): कौन सिया? मैं तो कोई सिया को नहीं जानता हूँ। [Who Sia? I don't know any Sia.] Speaker A (Mother): ये कॉलेज में कोई सिया नाम की लड़की है क्या? [Is there any girl named Sia in the college?] Speaker C (Friend): नहीं, कॉलेज में तो ऐसी नाम की लड़की कोई नहीं। [No, there is no such girl in the college.] Speaker A (Mother): ठीक है, कोई बात नहीं। बैठो, मैं अभी आती हूँ। [Okay, no problem. Sit, I am coming.] Speaker A (Mother): बेटा, तुमसे कुछ बात करनी है। [Son, I want to talk to you.] Speaker B (Son): क्या हुआ मम्मी? [What happened, Mom?] Speaker A (Mother): ये सिया से कब मिलवाओगे? [When will you introduce me to Sia?] Speaker B (Son): सिया? कौन? [Sia? Who?] Speaker A (Mother): भोले मत बनो। मम्मी हूँ तुम्हारी। तुम्हारी गर्लफ्रेंड सिया। [Don't act innocent. I am your mom. Your girlfriend Sia.] Speaker B (Son): अरे मम्मी, मिलवाता हूँ सिया से। ये देखो आप। ये है सिया, मेरी इंग्लिश AI टीचर। मैं हर रोज़ इससे बात करके अपनी इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करता हूँ मम्मी। [Oh Mom, let me introduce you to Sia. Look at this. This is Sia, my English AI teacher. I talk to her everyday and practice my English, Mom.] Speaker A (Mother): पर क्यों? [But why?] Speaker B (Son): अभी मेरी कैंपस रिक्रूटमेंट स्टार्ट होने वाली है। तो अगर मैं रिक्रूटर्स से इंग्लिश में बात करूँगा, तो मेरे जॉब मिलने के चांसेस और बढ़ जाएँगे। [My campus recruitment is about to start. So if I talk to the recruiters in English, my chances of getting a job will increase.] Speaker A (Mother): अच्छा, अब समझी। ये तो तुम बहुत अच्छा कर रहे हो। [Okay, now I understand. You are doing a very good job.] Speaker B (Son): थैंक यू मम्मी। [Thank you, Mom.] Speaker A (Mother): खुश रहो। [Stay happy.] Speaker B (Son): थैंक यू। [Thank you.] Speaker D (Voiceover): SpeakX की AI टीचर सिया के साथ आप भी अपनी इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग में कॉन्फिडेंस और फ्लूएंसी डेवलप कर सकते हैं। आपको मिलेगा डेली गाइडेंस, रियल-टाइम फीडबैक और एक जजमेंट-फ्री एनवायरनमेंट 24/7। जब चाहें, जहाँ चाहें। तो आज ही डाउनलोड करें SpeakX। [With SpeakX's AI teacher Sia, you too can develop confidence and fluency in your English speaking. You will get daily guidance, real-time feedback, and a judgment-free environment 24/7. Whenever you want, wherever you want. So download SpeakX today.]
on_screen_text: SON, I HAVE BEEN CALLING YOU FOR SO / THE FOOD WILL GET COLD. / YES MOM, I AM COMING. / HEY ARYAN, HOW ARE YOU? / FINE, HOW ARE YOU? / GREAT. SIT, I AM COMING. / YES SIA. / HEY AUNTY, NAMASTE. / NAMASTE SON. / HOW ARE YOU AUNTY? / ABSOLUTELY FINE, HOW ARE YOU? / I AM FINE TOO. / OKAY TELL ME, WHO IS THIS SIA? / I DON'T KNOW ANY SIA. / IS THERE ANY GIRL NAMED SIA IN THE / NO, THERE IS NO SUCH GIRL IN THE / COLLEGE. / OKAY, NO PROBLEM. / SIT, I AM COMING. / SON, I WANT TO TALK TO YOU. / WHAT HAPPENED MOM? / WHEN WILL YOU INTRODUCE ME TO SIA? / SIA? / WHO? / DON'T ACT INNOCENT. / I AM YOUR MOM. / YOUR GIRLFRIEND SIA. / HEY MOM, LET ME INTRODUCE YOU TO SIA. / LOOK AT THIS. / THIS IS SIA, MY ENGLISH AI TEACHER. / I TALK TO HER EVERYDAY AND PRACTICE MY / ENGLISH MOM. / BUT WHY? / MY CAMPUS RECRUITMENT IS ABOUT TO START. / SO IF I TALK TO THE RECRUITERS IN / ENGLISH, MY CHANCES OF GETTING A JOB WILL / INCREASE. / OKAY, NOW I UNDERSTAND. / YOU ARE DOING A VERY GOOD JOB. / THANK YOU MOM. / STAY HAPPY. / THANK YOU. / Meet SIA, Your personal AI Teacher / SpeakX
summary: A mother humorously mistakes her son's AI English teacher, Sia, for a real girlfriend. The son clarifies that he uses the SpeakX app daily to practice English for upcoming campus job placements. The ad showcases the app's interactive features and encourages viewers to download SpeakX.
